meaning: adj.12小时的,半天的,每12小时一次的,一天两次的
examples: The diurnal springs correspond to the semidiurnal neaps and vice versa.
In the marginal seas adjacent to Yantai, tides are regular semidiurnal tides; and tidal currents are diurnal currents.
The tide admittance analysis for the semidiurnal wave of the earth tide by use of the vector pattern of ground tilt observed at seismostations is expounded.
